title: Fix package grid action overflow row visibility

source.subject: fix(pckg): show grid action overflow row without VisibleOnLoad trap

body:
## Outcome

Show grid action overflow row without VisibleOnLoad trap.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **Registry dashboard and package docs foundation** (`v02-pckg-registry-foundation`).

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`067d53a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/067d53a) — fix(pckg): show grid action overflow row without VisibleOnLoad trap
